title: ChattyFactory
description: Track the current work order, phase, and artifacts so the orchestrator can debrief cleanly.

sections.title: Job Brief
sections.description: The stable request and anchor for the current work order.

blocks.title: Factory Rule
blocks.text: Freeze the interpretation once the user confirms it, then route changes through repair instead of silent drift.

sections.title: Execution
sections.description: Track the current phase, latest result, and active risks.

blocks.title: Factory Snapshot
blocks.empty: Fill in the work order, phase, and next action to see the snapshot.

blocks.title: Execution Board
blocks.empty: Add lines like [Doing] Validate build or Review | Prepare handoff to preview the board.

sections.title: Artifacts & Handoff
sections.description: The key files and the one-line next action.

blocks.title: Artifact Preview
blocks.empty: Add a module-local artifact path to preview it here.

fields.label: Job ID / Work order
fields.help: A stable work-order style name makes log review easier.

fields.label: Anchor (path or anchor name)
fields.help: Where the user can find the main trail of this job.

fields.label: Request (1 sentence)
fields.help: Keep this to one tight summary sentence.

fields.label: Interpretation (frozen)
fields.help: Use this after the task has been confirmed to avoid drift.

fields.label: Current phase
fields.help: A quick snapshot of where the job is right now.

fields.label: Key artifacts
fields.help: List the files another person or module would need first.

fields.label: Open issues / risks
fields.help: Current blockers, uncertainty, or repair work.

fields.label: Work board
fields.placeholder:
[To Do] Confirm constraints
[Doing] Build module surface
[Review] Test handoff
[Done] Freeze interpretation
fields.help: Use [Lane] task or Lane | task lines if you want the Execution Board to render them as a kanban board.

fields.label: Next action
fields.help: Keep this direct and immediately actionable.
